ddls:
CREATE TABLE "companies" (
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each company */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the company */,
  "brand_name" TEXT /* Name of the brand */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the company */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the company is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the company is located */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the company is located */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the company */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the company */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "crops" (
  "crop_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each crop variety */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company that owns the crop variety */,
  "variety" TEXT /* Name of the crop variety */,
  "trait" TEXT /* Trait of the crop variety (e.g., Xtend, Enlist/STS) */,
  "crop_type" TEXT /* Type of crop (e.g., corn, soybean, wheat) */,
  "maturity_days" INTEGER /* Number of days to maturity */,
  "growth_habits" TEXT /* Growth habits of the crop (e.g., determinate, indeterminate) */,
  "disease_resistance" TEXT /* Disease resistance of the crop (e.g., resistant, susceptible) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("crop_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_crops_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "yield_data" (
  "yield_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each yield data entry */,
  "crop_id" INTEGER /* ID of the crop variety */,
  "relative_maturity" REAL /* Relative maturity of the crop variety */,
  "yield_bu_a" REAL /* Yield performance of the crop variety in bushels per acre */,
  "moisture" REAL /* Moisture content of the crop */,
  "test_weight" REAL /* Test weight of the crop */,
  "oil_content" REAL /* Oil content of the crop */,
  "protein_content" REAL /* Protein content of the crop */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("yield_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_yield_data_crop_id FOREIGN KEY ("crop_id") REFERENCES crops ("crop_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "yield_comparison" (
  "comparison_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each yield comparison entry */,
  "crop_id" INTEGER /* ID of the crop variety */,
  "top_yield_group" REAL /* Top yield group percentage */,
  "years_in_test" INTEGER /* Number of years the crop variety has been in test */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the yield comparison was conducted */,
  "soil_type" TEXT /* Soil type where the yield comparison was conducted */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions during the yield comparison */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comparison_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_yield_comparison_crop_id FOREIGN KEY ("crop_id") REFERENCES crops ("crop_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "traits" (
  "trait_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trait */,
  "trait_name" TEXT /* Name of the trait (e.g., Xtend, Enlist/STS) */,
  "trait_description" TEXT /* Description of the trait */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trait_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "crop_traits" (
  "crop_trait_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each crop-trait relationship */,
  "crop_id" INTEGER /* ID of the crop variety */,
  "trait_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trait */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("crop_trait_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_crop_traits_trait_id FOREIGN KEY ("trait_id") REFERENCES traits ("trait_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_crop_traits_crop_id FOREIGN KEY ("crop_id") REFERENCES crops ("crop_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, farmer, admin) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company */,
  "crop_id" INTEGER /* ID of the crop variety */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_crop_id FOREIGN KEY ("crop_id") REFERENCES crops ("crop_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notes" (
  "note_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each note */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the note */,
  "crop_id" INTEGER /* ID of the crop variety */,
  "note_text" TEXT /* Text of the note */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the note was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("note_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notes_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notes_crop_id FOREIGN KEY ("crop_id") REFERENCES crops ("crop_id")
)
